task: In the TypeScript interface below, add a new optional field 'subtitle' of type string, with a JSDoc comment '/** Short subtitle for the image */'. Place it right after the 'headline' field. Output ONLY the edit block, nothing else.
inline_context:
export interface CarouselSlide {
    index: number
    headline?: string
    title: string
    description: string
    status: 'pending' | 'generating' | 'done' | 'error'
}
